text.autoconfig.bettermaceswap.title: Better Mace Swap Config
text.autoconfig.bettermaceswap.option.au: Automatically swap to Mace when hitting with a Sword.
text.autoconfig.bettermaceswap.option.br: Ticks to wait before swapping back to Sword after an attribute hit.
text.autoconfig.bettermaceswap.option.au: Automatically Axe-stun then Mace-slam after a Sword hit.
text.autoconfig.bettermaceswap.option.ma: Select which enchantment type to prioritize when swapping.
text.autoconfig.bettermaceswap.option.at: Enable combo logic against hostile mobs.
Enable combo logic against passive animals.
text.autoconfig.bettermaceswap.option.pe: Automatically throw a Wind Charge after throwing an Ender Pearl.
Ticks to wait after pearl throw before firing Wind Charge.
